description:
Track and evaluate the performance of your investment portfolio across stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets.


- New: Treemap coloring can now optionally be based on performance or category.
- New: Dashboard widgets for rebalancing status – shown as bar or pie charts.
- Improvement: Cost basis using moving average is now also shown in the trade list.
- Improvement: Current prices can now also be retrieved with a TwelveData subscription.
- Improvement: Tooltip for price changes now also shows the annualized change.
- Improvement: PDF importer extended for: Bison, Saxo Bank, Commerzbank, KBC Group NV, Trade Republic, Consorsbank, Modena Estonia, Crowdestor OÜ, Arkea Direct Bank, TargoBank, Comdirect, Hargreaves Lansdown Asset Management, BSDEX.
- Fix: Resolved an issue with trade assignment after multiple portfolio transfers of a position.
- Beta: Price provider for historical prices of European and US stocks (see forum).
